headline: Synlait outlines “recovery roadmap” after H1 loss
summary: The NZ dairy and formula group booked a half-year loss of NZ$80.6m (US$47.1m), a result its CEO called “frustratingly disappointing”.

raw.headline: Synlait outlines “recovery roadmap” after H1 loss

headline: Abbott completes acquisition of Exact Sciences
summary: Abbott (NYSE: ABT) today announced it has completed the acquisition of Exact Sciences, establishing Abbott as a leader in fast-growing cancer screening and diagnostics segments and enabling the company to serve millions of additional people.
